provenance: SYNTHETIC test data, not an observation. Entries are constructed to exercise the models-list response shape; no operator observed this content and no capture produced it. The field shape is derived from real captures retained under docs/catalog/payloads/, so a fixture cannot exercise a path live capture would not reach. An earlier version of this file described itself as a recording observed by the operator, which was false: the shape was faithful, the content was invented, and the sentence claiming observation exceeded its evidence. Corrected 2026-07-23.
recorded_at_meaning: The date this synthetic fixture is dated to for freshness-window tests. It is not an observation date.
